ivr_result_codes.description: Member interacted with IVR and confirmed an appointment is already scheduled with a provider
ivr_result_codes.notes: Gap remains open until appointment is completed and documented; set to attempted_not_closed

ivr_result_codes.description: Member self-reported that the service has already been completed but no claim on file
ivr_result_codes.notes: TRICKY: cannot close gap without claim verification; keep as attempted_not_closed pending provider confirmation

ivr_result_codes.description: Member actively declined the service or chose opt-out option in IVR menu
ivr_result_codes.notes: Member was reached; gap not closeable without service completion

ivr_result_codes.description: IVR call connected but no live member interaction; automated voicemail left
ivr_result_codes.notes: No member engagement; gap remains open

ivr_result_codes.description: Call was dropped or phone disconnected before member interaction
Person who answered is not the member; wrong number on file
ivr_result_codes.notes: Invalid contact; update member phone record; do not count as contact attempt against member

ivr_result_codes.description: Member requested transfer to a live agent or a scheduled callback
ivr_result_codes.notes: Member engaged; follow-up required by live agent

ivr_result_codes.description: Member could not communicate in available IVR language; transferred to interpreter service
ivr_result_codes.notes: Member reached but communication barrier; flag for multilingual outreach

sms_result_codes.description: Member replied YES or affirmative to SMS prompt
Member replied NO or opted out via SMS
Member replied STOP or similar opt-out keyword; must not be re-texted
sms_result_codes.notes: Mark member do-not-contact via SMS; use alternative channel

sms_result_codes.description: SMS delivery failed; number is invalid, landline, or deactivated
SMS delivered but member did not respond within the response window

mail_result_codes.description: Mail piece confirmed delivered to address on file
mail_result_codes.notes: Delivery does not equal engagement; no member response tracked

mail_result_codes.description: Mail returned as undeliverable; address likely incorrect or member moved
mail_result_codes.notes: Flag member address for update; potential disenrollment risk

mail_result_codes.description: Mail delivered but no response received within expected window
